/* blaaaaaahhh */
body {
  margin: 0;
}

/* Full-width header */
.page-header {
  background-color: lightgreen;
  width: 100%;
  padding: 15px 0;
  display: flex;
  justify-content: center; /* Centers the box */
}

/* green header */
.header-box {
  font-family: Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;
  font-size: 10px;
  border: 2px solid black;
  padding: 8px 15px;
  background-color: white;
}






index.html

# My-first-website
uhhhh this is my first website 🆒🆒🆒🆒🆒🦔🦔🐀🐀

 
<h2>About Me 🐀🆒🆒</h2>
<p>
 HOWDY DOODY! my name is Jairo Mata, and I am taking this course because honestly it was required for my degree, BUT this coding bussiness looks wicked as frick, so I am READY to learn. (I am also quite fond of the video game character Sonic The Hedgehog)
  And I'm sure i'll be confused time to time (I probably will most of the time), but we can all do that together! yup yup.
</p>
 <h2>Ma Hobbies! ✏️</h2>
 
<ul>
  <li>Drawing</li>
  <li>trinket collecting</li>
  <li>video gaming</li>
  <li>Designing custom cassette tape J cards</li>
  <li>Bug/Lizard finding</li>
</ul>
<h2>Cool bean sites 💻</h2>
<ol>
  <li><a href="https://www.youtube.com/" target="Youtube">Youtube</a></li>
  <li>
    <a href="https://www.coolmathgames.com/" target="CoolMathGames">CoolMathGames</a>
  </li>
</ol>
﻿
<h2>Sonic The Hedgehog is pretty rad 🦔🔵</h2>
 <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64,"alt="This is the Japanese boxart of the game Sonic CD">

<h2>Thank you for reading!</h2>

<img src="https://m.gjcdn.net/fireside-post-image/900/39666852-gk7iggkr-v4.webp" alt="">
 <main>
    <section id="about">
      <h2>About section 2!</h2>
      <p>Hello!, as you know my name is Jairo Mata, and I like drawing/designing, I also like to collect little trinkets, play video games like Minecraft, PEAK, Fortnite, and MANY Sonic The Hedgehog games, speaking of Sonic The Hedgehog I think he is very COOL BEANS, but if I rambled about it, it would probably take the whole space here so I will move on, I also like VHS tapes and Cassette tapes to listen to my favorite tunes on, I also like to design custom J cards (that's what the paper inside the cassette case is called) to add that extra flavor to what im listening to, I also like to go out and look for cool bugs or capturing lizards if I see them, my favorite color is blue, but I ask myself "Do I like the color blue because sonic is blue? or do did I get obsessed with Sonic because he is blue?" because I've liked both since I was a we little lad so I've always been unsure, and I guess I'll never truly know, BUT that's enough about me, thanks for reading! </p>
    </section>
    <h1>you can do anything!</h1>
   <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Description of the image">
  
   <!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <title>Contact Form Example</title>
</head>
<body>
 
 
  <h1>Contact Me</h1>
 
 
  <form action="/submit" method="post">
    <!-- Name Field -->
    <label for="name">Name:</label><br>
    <input type="text" id="name" name="name" placeholder="Your name"><br><br>
 
 
    <!-- Email Field -->
    <label for="email">Email:</label><br>
    <input type="email" id="email" name="email" placeholder="you@example.com"><br><br>
 
 
    <!-- Message Field -->
    <label for="message">Message:</label><br>
    <textarea id="message" name="message" rows="4" cols="30" placeholder="Type your message here"></textarea><br><br>
 
 
    <!-- Dropdown Menu -->
    <label for="topic">Topic:</label><br>
    <select id="topic" name="topic">
      <option value="general">General Question</option>
      <option value="feedback">Feedback</option>
      <option value="support">Support</option>
    </select><br><br>
 
 
    <!-- Submit Button -->
    <button type="submit">Send</button>
  </form>
 
 
</body>
</html>
 
 
</body>
</html>
   <!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <title>My Contact Page</title>
</head>
<body>
  <header>
    <h1>About/contacts/favorite site</h1>
    <nav>
      <a href="#about">About</a>
      <a href="#contact">Contact</a>
      <a href=https://www.youtube.com/>Youtube.com</a>
    </nav>
  
   <footer>
    <p>&copy; 2026 Jairo Mata</p>
  </footer>
</body>
</html>



body {
  background-color: #1F56ED; /* Replace with your desired color */
  margin: 0; /* Removes default body margin */
  padding: 0; /* Removes default body padding */
  /* height: 100vh; /* Use this for full viewport height */ */
}







<section class="about">
  <div class="about-text">
    <h2>About Me</h2>
    <p>
      Howdy!, My name is Jairo Mata, and I like the color blue, drawing, playing video games, designing custom cassette tape J cards, arts & crafts, I'm quite fond of the video game character Sonic The Hedgehog, I like owls, hedgehog's, mice, frogs, lizards, and especially catching lizards when I see one, that is all for now, thanks for reading!
    </p>
  
  </div>

  <div class="about-image">
    <img src="https://images-wixmp-ed30a86b8c4ca887773594c2.wixmp.com/f/43d6dc99-15db-4748-92c3-05aadac6eae8/dk2it16-9faca3cb-b57a-4f38-8f98-0cae68b0a3e1.png?token=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..qQubBftfOVpK_M29QwhqYbdi3VTYDR6eM3dkUdV_ldk" alt="Profile Image">
  </div>
</section>




/* Basic Page Styling */
body {
  margin: 0;
  font-family: Arial, sans-serif;
  background-color: #f2f2f2;
}

/* FLEXBOX LAYOUT */
.about {
  display: flex;              /* Turns section into flex container */
  align-items: center;        /* Vertically center items */
  justify-content: center;    /* Center horizontally */
  gap: 40px;                  /* Space between text and image */
  padding: 60px;
  max-width: 1000px;
  margin: auto;
  background-color: white;
  border-radius: 10px;
}

/* Make both sides equal width */
.about-text,
.about-image {
  flex: 1;
}

/* Responsive Image */
.about-image img {
  width: 100%;
  height: auto;
  border-radius: 10px;
}

/* RESPONSIVE DESIGN */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .about {
    flex-direction: column;   /* Stack vertically */
    text-align: center;
  }
}

.about {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 40px;
  padding: 60px;
  max-width: 1000px;
  margin: auto;

  background-color: skyblue;  /* ← Change added here */
  border-radius: 10px;
}
